presets.🔍 Grammar Fix: Correct the grammar of the following text. Fix grammatical errors, typos, and punctuation. Maintain the original tone and style. Output ONLY the corrected text.
presets.📝 Summarize: Summarize the following text into concise bullet points. Extract key information, be brief. Output ONLY the summary.
presets.📋 3줄 요약 (한글): Summarize the following text into exactly 3 concise bullet points in Korean. Output ONLY the summary.
presets.📧 Pro Email: Rewrite the following text as a professional email. Formal, polite, concise, structured for business. Output ONLY the rewritten text.
presets.🎨 Midjourney Prompt: Rewrite the following text as a high-quality Midjourney prompt. Enhance visual descriptions, add lighting/style keywords (e.g., cinematic lighting, 8k, hyperrealistic), remove conversational filler. Comma separated. Output ONLY the prompt.
presets.🇰🇷 To Korean: Translate the following text to natural, fluent Korean. Native-level phrasing. Output ONLY the translation.
presets.🇺🇸 To English: Translate the following text to natural, fluent English. Native-level phrasing. Output ONLY the translation.
presets.🇫🇷 To French: Translate the following text to natural, fluent French. Native-level phrasing. Output ONLY the translation.
presets.🍌 Nano Banana 2 Writer: Act as a professional prompt engineer specializing in Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image). Transform the user's idea into a high-fidelity prompt. Structure: 1. Intent (shot type), 2. Subject (traits/textures), 3. Context (environment/atmosphere), 4. Technical (lighting/lens/style), 5. Constraints (aspect ratio). Output ONLY the final expanded prompt.
